# bankruptcydenied.com

> Guide to bankruptcy case denial, dismissal, and discharge denial. Means test failure, bad faith filing, prior dismissals, fraud, and what to do if your case is denied.

bankruptcydenied.com is a free, open-source educational resource about bankruptcy. Part of the Open Bankruptcy Project.

## Pages

- https://bankruptcydenied.com/: Can Bankruptcy Be Denied?
- https://bankruptcydenied.com/chapter-7-denial.html: Chapter 7 Bankruptcy Denial -- Why Cases Get Dismissed
- https://bankruptcydenied.com/means-test-failure.html: Means Test Failure -- What Happens If You Fail
- https://bankruptcydenied.com/bad-faith-filing.html: Bad Faith Bankruptcy Filing -- What It Means
- https://bankruptcydenied.com/prior-dismissal.html: Prior Bankruptcy Dismissal -- How It Affects Your New Case
- https://bankruptcydenied.com/incomplete-paperwork.html: Incomplete Paperwork -- When Bankruptcy Is Dismissed for Missing Documents
- https://bankruptcydenied.com/fraud-concealment.html: Fraud and Concealment in Bankruptcy -- Discharge Denial
- https://bankruptcydenied.com/what-to-do-if-denied.html: What to Do If Your Bankruptcy Is Denied or Dismissed
- https://bankruptcydenied.com/faq.html: Bankruptcy Denial FAQ

## Contact

This site is maintained by volunteers. No legal advice is provided.
